lessons.title: Life on the LAN: The Neighborhood
lessons.description: Understand local area network dynamics: how devices find each other and why DHCP and ARP exist.

lessons.title: DHCP: Your Automatic Address Butler
lessons.description: Master the DORA process, lease times, DHCP options, and relay agents.

lessons.title: ARP: The Local Directory Assistance
lessons.description: How IP addresses get resolved to MAC addresses in real-time, plus caching and Gratuitous ARP.

lessons.title: LAN Attacks: Starvation, Spoofing, Poisoning
lessons.description: Deep dive into DHCP and ARP attacks that can compromise the entire local network.

lessons.title: Defending the LAN: Snooping, Inspection, and IPv6
lessons.description: Mitigation techniques like DHCP Snooping, Dynamic ARP Inspection, and Neighbor Discovery.
